home.title: AlbumDone
home.subtitle: Local photo organizer
home.manageFolders: Manage your local photo folders with ease.
home.privacyBody: Basic organization, duplicate detection, and local archiving are processed on your device. When AI screenshot understanding or cloud model features are enabled, the current screenshot, instructions, and required content are sent directly to the model provider or Custom Endpoint you choose. The developer does not receive or store your photos or API keys.

errors.noReadablePhotos: No readable photos were found. The folder may be empty, contain offline placeholder files, or include unsupported or corrupt files.

dedup.title: Auto Dedup
dedup.subtitle: Find and remove duplicate photos automatically.

culling.title: Manual Culling
culling.subtitle: Review photos one by one and choose keep or delete.

screenshots.title: Screenshots
screenshots.subtitle: Organize screenshots by date and folder.

yearInReview.title: Year in Review
yearInReviewSubtitle: See what each month left behind.
yearInReviewPersonResult: Found your most frequent companion across {{months}} months

dedup.movedToTrash: {{count}} photos moved to trash with {{days}}-day retention.
dedup.deletedFromLibrary: {{count}} photos deleted from the photo library.
dedup.groupsSummary: Found {{groups}} similar-photo groups — selected for deletion: {{count}}
dedup.deletePartial: {{deleted}} photos were deleted. {{failed}} files could not be deleted and remain in the library.

status.inputScope: All {{total}} selected photos are included in this run.
status.contentSignatureProgress: Preparing exact-match signatures: {{processed}} / {{candidates}} photos (all {{total}} input photos remain in scope)
status.signatureProgress: Generating missing visual signatures: {{processed}} / {{candidates}} (all {{total}} input photos remain in scope)
status.signatureFailures: {{count}} photos could not be visually decoded and were skipped.

reasons.possibleDuplicate: Pixel content is highly similar. Review manually before deletion.
reasons.highlySimilar: Highly similar photos found. One deletion candidate has been selected.
reasons.largestFile: Largest file, likely the best-quality copy
reasons.metadataBest: Best available copy based on metadata

culling.preprocessingSubtitle: Sorting obvious keepers and rejects so you only review the uncertain ones.
culling.manualDescription: Review photos one by one and choose keep or delete.
culling.aiProcessed: AI auto-processed {{processed}} photos — {{uncertain}} need your review
culling.exitPendingBody: You marked {{count}} photos for deletion. Delete them before leaving, or go back without deleting?
culling.noApiWarning: No AI model configured — all photos will go to manual review
culling.fallbackTrashNotice:
Some files could not be moved to the system trash and were moved to:
{{paths}}
culling.confirmTrashDetailed:
Move {{count}} photos to trash?

Delete method: the app uses the system trash first. If system trash is unavailable, files are moved to .photo-manager-trash beside the current folder.

Consider making a backup first.
culling.deletedFromLibrary: {{count}} photos deleted from the photo library.
culling.exitWithPendingDeletions: There are pending deletions. Discard them and go back?
culling.missingSessionKeyTitle: API key missing for this session
culling.missingSessionKeySaved: This provider has saved non-sensitive settings, but the API key is not loaded in the current session. Re-enter it in Settings before AI pre-processing.
culling.missingSessionKeyEmpty: Finish AI key setup in Settings first.
culling.fallbackToManual: Failures will fall back to manual culling

screenshots.title: Screenshots ({{count}})
screenshots.emptySubtitle: No screenshots were found after scanning the selected album.
screenshots.noApiKey: Please configure an API key in Settings first.
screenshots.noVisionModel: No vision model is configured. Save a vision-capable model in Settings first.
screenshots.cloudConfirmBody:
AI screenshot understanding will send the current screenshot and your instructions to: {{destination}}.

Confirm that you trust this provider or endpoint. The developer does not receive or store this data.
screenshots.trustForSession: Do not remind me this session
screenshots.requiresApiKey: This feature requires an API key. Configure one in Settings.

ocr.tooltip: Extract visible text with the selected AI model

screenshots.disabledSubtitle: Load screenshots and configure a vision model before running AI instructions.

instructionPrompts.extract_text: Additional instruction: extract all visible text from this screenshot. Preserve important structure, line breaks, numbers, names, dates, and labels. If the screenshot contains multiple sections, group the extracted text by section.
instructionPrompts.translate_zh: Additional instruction: translate into Simplified Chinese
instructionPrompts.formal_email: Additional instruction: rewrite as a formal email
instructionPrompts.casual_msg: Additional instruction: rewrite as a casual message
instructionPrompts.extract_numbers: Additional instruction: extract numbers, amounts, and dates
instructionPrompts.commitments: Additional instruction: identify commitments and responsible people

apiConfig.title: API Configuration
apiConfig.description: Your API keys are stored locally in system secure storage (Keychain / Credential Manager). All requests go directly from your device to the provider.
apiConfig.qwenWorkspaceRequired: Alibaba Model Studio requires the Base URL for the workspace and region that created this API Key.
apiConfig.secureKeyHint: API Key is stored in system secure storage and is not written to normal settings cache.
apiConfig.missingSessionKey: Enter an API key for this session first
apiConfig.missingSessionKeyForTest: Enter an API key for this session before testing the connection.

endpointRisk.querySecret: Endpoint URLs must not include API keys or tokens in query parameters.
endpointRisk.cloudBaseUrlRequired: This provider requires a public cloud HTTPS Base URL on mobile.
endpointRisk.mobileCloudOnly: Mobile only supports public cloud HTTPS endpoints. Localhost, LAN, and local deployments are not supported.
endpointRisk.localhostHttp: Endpoint risk: local machine HTTP. Only connect to services you trust.
endpointRisk.lanHttp: LAN HTTP endpoints are unencrypted and may expose request content. They are blocked by default; only connect to local services you trust.
endpointRisk.remoteHttp: Remote HTTP endpoints are blocked by default. Use HTTPS or localhost HTTP.
endpointRisk.unsupported: Only HTTPS or localhost HTTP endpoints are allowed.

errors.apiKey: API Key is invalid, expired, or rejected by the provider.
errors.permission: API Key does not have permission for this model or service.
errors.baseUrl: Base URL is not reachable. Check the address, protocol, and proxy service.
errors.modelNotFound: Model is unavailable. Check the model name and account access.
errors.requestFormat: Request format is not compatible. Confirm that the service supports OpenAI-compatible chat completions.
errors.rateLimited: Request was rate limited. Try again later or check account quota.
errors.proxy: Proxy service error. Check the proxy status or upstream model service.
errors.server: Model service returned a server error. Try again later.
errors.timeout: Network request timed out. Check the network or proxy service.
errors.network: Network request failed. Check the network connection.
errors.emptyResponse: Model returned an empty or incomplete response.
errors.unknown: Model connection failed. Check the configuration and try again.

taskRouting.title: Task Routing
taskRouting.visionDesc: Used for screenshot analysis and instruction execution
taskRouting.textDesc: Used for culling pre-processing and analysis

storage.title: Storage
storage.description: Settings and generated results stay on this device.

customInstructions.title: Custom Instructions
customInstructions.promptPlaceholder: Prompt text sent to the AI model

toast.copy_failed_focus_retry: Copy failed. Click the result text and try again.

photoLibrary.permissionDescription: Photo access is required to browse and organize your library.
photoLibrary.missingPhotoPermission: Photo library permission is required to load device photos.
photoLibrary.checkPhotoPermission: Album loading failed. Check photo access permission.

analysis.savedConfigMissingSessionKey: Settings are saved, but no API key is loaded for this session
analysis.cullingFallbackManual: AI pre-processing failed. Continue with manual review.

yearInReview.noPhotosThisMonth: No photo record for this month

yearInReview.errors.selectFolder: Please select a folder from Home before generating Year in Review.
yearInReview.errors.noReadablePhotos: No readable photos found in the selected folder.
yearInReview.errors.notEnoughPhotos: Year in Review did not find enough readable photos to generate a result.
yearInReview.errors.generateFailed: Failed to generate Year in Review.
